hero.subtitle: From SEO to retention, we build full-funnel marketing systems that drive measurable revenue for e-commerce brands — not vanity metrics.
painPoints.label: The challenge
painPoints.title: Why most e-commerce marketing underperforms
painPoints.cpms.title: Rising CPMs
painPoints.cpms.description: Average CPM increase across Meta and Google over two years. Without diversified acquisition channels and creative optimization, ad costs will keep eating into your margins.
painPoints.attribution.title: Broken attribution
painPoints.attribution.description: Of conversions go untracked after iOS privacy changes. If you're still relying on last-click attribution, you're making budget decisions on incomplete data.
painPoints.retention.title: Leaky retention
painPoints.retention.description: It costs 5x more to acquire a new customer than to retain an existing one. Most e-commerce brands over-invest in acquisition while ignoring the customers they already have.
services.label: Our services
services.title: Full-funnel marketing for e-commerce growth
services.seo.title: E-commerce SEO
services.seo.description: Product page optimization, category SEO architecture, schema markup, and image SEO that drive organic traffic with high purchase intent.
services.seo.features: Product page optimization, Category SEO architecture, Schema markup, Image SEO
services.paid.title: Paid shopping campaigns
services.paid.description: Google Shopping, Meta catalog ads, TikTok Shop, Pinterest, and Amazon advertising managed with a ROAS-first methodology.
services.paid.features: Google Shopping, Meta catalog ads, TikTok Shop ads, Amazon advertising
services.email.title: Email & SMS marketing
services.email.description: Abandoned cart sequences, post-purchase flows, win-back campaigns, and VIP segmentation that turn one-time buyers into repeat customers.
services.email.features: Abandoned cart sequences, Post-purchase flows, Win-back campaigns, VIP segmentation
services.social.title: Social commerce
services.social.description: Shoppable posts, influencer seeding programs, and UGC campaigns that turn social engagement into direct revenue.
services.social.features: Shoppable posts, Influencer seeding, UGC campaigns, Social storefronts
services.content.title: Content marketing
services.content.description: Product storytelling, buying guides, comparison content, and video reviews that build trust and drive organic discovery.
services.content.features: Product storytelling, Buying guides, Comparison content, Video reviews
services.cro.title: Conversion rate optimization
services.cro.description: A/B testing, checkout optimization, upsell and cross-sell strategies, and mobile conversion improvements backed by data.
services.cro.features: A/B testing, Checkout optimization, Upsell & cross-sell, Mobile conversion
services.loyalty.title: Retention & loyalty marketing
services.loyalty.description: Loyalty programs, referral campaigns, and subscription marketing that maximize customer lifetime value and reduce churn.
services.loyalty.features: Loyalty programs, Referral campaigns, Subscription marketing, Churn prevention
metrics.label: Client results
metrics.title: Performance that compounds quarter over quarter
metrics.roas.label: Average return on ad spend
metrics.aov.label: Average order value increase
metrics.conversion.label: Conversion rate improvement
metrics.ltv.label: Customer lifetime value growth
metrics.cac.label: Customer acquisition cost reduction
howItWorks.label: Our process
howItWorks.title: From audit to compounding growth
howItWorks.step1.title: Audit
howItWorks.step1.description: We analyze your marketing mix, attribution model, creative performance, and unit economics to identify where revenue is being left on the table.
howItWorks.step2.title: Build
howItWorks.step2.description: Channel strategy, creative frameworks, automation flows, and measurement infrastructure — built to your specific product catalog and audience.
howItWorks.step3.title: Attract
howItWorks.step3.description: Launch campaigns across paid, organic, and owned channels with continuous creative testing and budget optimization driven by real-time ROAS data.
howItWorks.step4.title: Optimize
howItWorks.step4.description: Weekly performance reviews, A/B testing cadence, creative refresh cycles, and audience expansion — compounding results quarter over quarter.
contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Start growing your e-commerce revenue
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your store and marketing goals. We'll respond within 24 hours with a preliminary channel assessment.
cta.title: Book your e-commerce marketing audit
cta.subtitle: 45-minute call. We'll review your marketing mix, identify the highest-ROI channels, and outline a growth plan — with projected ROAS numbers.
terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.general.title: 1. General provisions
terms.general.body: These Terms & Conditions govern the use of services provided by GrowGroup ("Company", "we", "us"). By engaging our services or using this website, you agree to these terms in full. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms.services.title: 2. Scope of services
terms.services.body: GrowGroup provides e-commerce marketing services including but not limited to SEO, paid advertising, email marketing, social commerce, content marketing, conversion rate optimization, and retention marketing as described in individual project agreements.
terms.ip.title: 3. Intellectual property
terms.ip.body: Upon full payment, all deliverables created specifically for the client become the client's property, unless stated otherwise in the project agreement. Pre-existing tools, frameworks, and methodologies used by GrowGroup remain the intellectual property of GrowGroup.
terms.payment.title: 4. Payment terms
terms.payment.body: Payment terms are defined in each project agreement. Unless otherwise specified, invoices are due within 14 days of issue. Late payments may incur interest at the statutory rate. GrowGroup reserves the right to suspend services if payments are overdue by more than 30 days.
terms.liability.title: 5. Limitation of liability
terms.liability.body: GrowGroup's total liability for any claim arising from services provided shall not exceed the total fees paid by the client for the specific project in question. GrowGroup is not liable for indirect, consequential, or incidental damages, including lost profits or data.
terms.termination.title: 6. Termination
terms.termination.body: Either party may terminate an ongoing engagement with 30 days' written notice. Upon termination, the client is responsible for payment of all work completed up to the termination date. GrowGroup will provide reasonable handover of all deliverables produced.
terms.law.title: 7. Governing law
terms.law.body: These terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Poland. Any disputes shall be resolved by the competent courts in Poland.
terms.contact.title: 8. Contact
terms.contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@grow.com.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro.title: 1. Introduction
privacy.intro.body: GrowGroup ("Company", "we", "us") respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.
privacy.collect.title: 2. Information we collect
privacy.collect.body: We collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name, email address, phone number, and company details when you fill out a contact form or schedule a consultation. We also collect technical data automatically, including IP address, browser type, device information, and browsing behavior via cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.use.title: 3. How we use your data
privacy.use.body: We use your personal data to respond to inquiries and provide requested services, send project proposals and service-related communications, improve our website and services, comply with legal obligations, and — with your consent — send marketing communications about our services.
privacy.sharing.title: 4. Data sharing
privacy.sharing.body: We do not sell your personal data. We may share data with trusted service providers who assist us in operating our business (e.g., hosting, analytics, CRM), but only to the extent necessary and under appropriate data processing agreements. We may also disclose data when required by law.
privacy.cookies.title: 5. Cookies
privacy.cookies.body: Our website uses cookies to enhance your browsing experience and analyze site traffic. You can control cookie preferences through your browser settings. Essential cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be disabled.
privacy.rights.title: 6. Your rights
privacy.rights.body: Under GDPR and applicable data protection laws, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data. You may also object to processing or request data portability. To exercise these rights, contact us at privacy@grow.com.
privacy.retention.title: 7. Data retention
privacy.retention.body: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for the purposes described in this policy, or as required by law. Contact form submissions are retained for up to 24 months unless a business relationship is established.
privacy.changes.title: 8. Changes to this policy
privacy.changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.
privacy.contact.title: 9. Contact
privacy.contact.body: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your data rights, contact us at privacy@grow.com.
